data.location: Suites 109 and 110 at 9 Dog Lane in Storrs
data.short_description: A new trading card store is coming to Storrs Center. Monmouth Cards will be located in Suites 109 and 110 at 9 Dog Lane in Storrs, next door to Jefferson Fry Company. No timeline has been announced for their opening.

Soft Serve Factory is NOW OPEN at 700 Watertown Avenue in Waterbury, the former Carvel space. The ice cream shop opened yesterday, 05/10. It is a locally owned shop that previously operated under the Carvel brand for over 15 years.
Soft Serve Factory replaces Carvel in Waterbury in the same space. The shop had been serving the community for over 15 years previously under the Carvel brand.

data.store_name: Wick & Wander by The New England Couple
data.short_description: A new locally owned candle shop Wick & Wander by The New England Couple is coming soon to Downtown Putnam. It will be located at 112 Main Street Unit 13 in Putnam, the former home of Wolperdinger Bookends. The shop will sell signature organic soy candles and more and is expected to open after mid June.

data.location: The Plaza at Buckland Hills on Pleasant Valley Road in Manchester
data.short_description: Nothing Bundt Cakes is planning a new location at The Plaza at Buckland Hills on Pleasant Valley Road in Manchester. Plans are currently being bid with area contractors. Stay tuned for more information on their opening.

Frisbie's Dairy Barn is officially open at Blue Back Square at 38 Isham Road in West Hartford, the former Kilwins space. They are celebrating their official opening today from 1pm to 10pm. The shop serves nearly 2 dozen different ice cream flavors.

The Frosted Sheep Bake Shop opens in Canton at 220 Albany Turnpike, part of the Canton Village shopping center. They celebrated their grand opening last weekend. The bakery sells scratch-made cookies and cupcakes with various flavors.

O’Reilly Auto Parts is eyeing the former Local Craft Kitchen site at 850 West Main Street in Branford for a new location. The existing building would be demolished and a new building constructed. Plans are subject to local approvals.
The existing building on the site has sat vacant since Local Craft Kitchen closed in July 2024.
Don Cola'o Panaderia is NOW OPEN at 43 East Main Street in Meriden, on the first floor of the Wells Fargo building. The cafe features authentic pastries, coffee, sandwiches, and Latin-inspired items.
Mystic Market will open this Tuesday at 295 Flanders Road in East Lyme, the former Daddy's Noodle Bar/Five Guys space. It is a gourmet market and eatery serving breakfast, grab & go meals, and more.
Toy Vault is nearing the opening of their new store at suite 290 at Tanger Outlets, Foxwoods. They buy and sell new & vintage toys, gaming cards, video games, and pop-culture items.
Enzo Mens Wear is NOW OPEN in their new home at suite 310 at Tanger Outlets, Foxwoods. It is a men’s formal wear and clothing store previously located at the Crystal Mall.

data.status: will reopen in the new space on May 13th
data.short_description: Vineyard Vines Outlet is moving to a new larger space in suite 330 at Tanger Outlets, Foxwoods. The store will be open until May 10th and reopen in the new space on May 13th.

data.store_name: Clean Eats by The Dessert Board Company
data.location: main concourse of Tanger Outlets, Foxwoods
data.short_description: Clean Eats by The Dessert Board Company is NOW OPEN in the main concourse of Tanger Outlets, Foxwoods. They offer gluten-free, dairy-free, nut-free, and soy-free eats including healthy snacks and specialty cookies.

data.location: Casino of the Earth at Mohegan Sun
data.event_date: Not specified (reopened last Friday, grand reopening May 21st)
data.short_description: Bobby’s Burgers by Bobby Flay reopened after renovation and rebranding at Mohegan Sun, replacing the previous Bobby’s Burger Palace restaurant. A grand reopening event will be held on May 21st at 1:00pm.

non_working.reason: no business details (only TV show filming at existing restaurant)
